zh.lifeSummary: Joane Cheyne是Richard Cheyne和Margaret de Cralle的女兒，出生在英國肯特易亞斯丘其。她於1425年與Thomas at Towne在英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在英國肯特洛利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joane Cheyne是Richard Cheyne和Margaret de Cralle的女儿，出生在英国肯特易亞斯丘其。她于1425年与Thomas at Towne在英国英格兰肯特法維沙安结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在英国肯特洛利。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Joane Cheyne was born in Eastchurch, Kent, England as the daughter of Richard Cheyne and Margaret de Cralle. She married Thomas at Towne in 1425, in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in Throwley, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane CheyneはイギリスケントエアストチャーチでRichard CheyneとMargaret de Cralleの娘として生まれた。1425年にイギリスイギリスケントファバーシャムでThomas at Towneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスケントスロウリーで死去した。

ko.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Joane Cheyne(은)는 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 Richard Cheyne(와)과 Margaret de Cralle의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤에서 Thomas at Towne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 켄트 스로우리에서 사망했다.

ru.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: алл сеинц' чурч, эасчурч, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Joane Cheyne родилась в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия. Её родителей звали Richard Cheyne и Margaret de Cralle. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas at Towne в 1425 г. в местности фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности троули, кэнт, Англия.
